description.zh-cn: 运费险：结算时可选投保，按固定保费或订单金额百分比(含保费上下限)收取，作为结算费用项计入订单；记录投保订单便于退货时核赔参考。前端传 freight_insurance=1 即开启投保。
description.en: Freight insurance: optional opt-in at checkout charging a flat or percent premium (with min/max), added as a checkout fee; insured orders are logged for return/claim reference. Pass freight_insurance=1 to opt in.
